creator: bicknell@ufp.org
text:
On Tue, Jul 10, 2001 at 09:22:01PM -0400, Richard A. Steenbergen wrote:
> Note the date and version of this PR. May 31 1999, FreeBSD 2.2.6.

Being that it's still open after a pr closing spree, I would suggest
it's likely still broken, too.
